title: Motorola announces a partnership with GrapheneOS
author: km
aiHeadline: Motorola teams up with GrapheneOS in a desperate attempt to save itself from the clutches of boring tech partnerships.

title: Microsoft bans the word "Microslop" on its Discord, then locks the server
author: robtherobber
aiHeadline: Microsoft gets its feelings hurt, bans 'Microslop' from its Discord server, then locks it down when everyone laughs.

title: /e/OS is a complete, fully “deGoogled” mobile ecosystem
author: doener
aiHeadline: Finally, a phone OS that’s so 'deGoogled' it might as well be running on a paperclip.

title: The workers behind Meta’s smart glasses can see everything
author: sandbach
aiHeadline: Meta’s smart glasses: because nothing says 'privacy' like having random workers stare at your life through augmented reality.

title: How to talk to anyone and why you should
author: Looky1173
aiHeadline: How to talk to anyone: because nothing says 'social success' like awkwardly trying to chat with strangers in a coffee shop.
